readings.summary: Paul and Barnabas journey extensively, returning to Antioch.

readings.citation:
Ps 145:8-9, 10-11, 12-13, R. see v.1
I will praise your name for ever, my king and my God.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 145:8-9, 10-11, 12-13, R. see v.1
I will praise your name for ever, my king and my God.

readings.summary:
I give you a new commandment, says the Lord:
love one another as I have loved you.
Jesus issues a new commandment, love one another.

antiphons.text:
O sing a new song to the Lord,
for he has worked wonders;
in the sight of the nations
he has shown his deliverance, alleluia.

I am the true vine and you are the branches, 
Says the Lord. Whoever remains in me,
and I in him, bears fruit in plenty, alleluia.
